title: Ubiquiti UniFi switch USW-Pro-Max-16
description: Ubiquiti Pro Max 16 is a new L3 switch that offers 4x 2.5 Gbps and 12x 1 Gbps ports. For optical interface connection, there are 2 SFP+ ports achieving speeds up to 10 Gb/s. The switch is powered via a USB-C 5V DC 25W Notice: For rack installation, it is necessary to purchase the accessory Ubiquiti Pro Max 16 Rack Mount The switch supports Etherlighting technology, allowing color indication of port location, link speed, defined device types, PoE status or individual VLANs The switch does not have web management but is centrally managed via UniFi Controller with support for the mobile app UniFi and offers an extensive set of advanced switching protocols and L2 features, including operational mode (switching, mirroring, or aggregation) per port. UniFi Network Controller and mobile app enable administrators to configure and monitor virtually all switch features in a graphical user interface from anywhere Device DC Power Adapter Mounting Kit
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (12) 10/100/1000Mbps + (4) 10/100/2500Mbps Optical interfaces (2) 1G/10Gbps Other features Touchscreen Power Power type USB-C Max. power consumption [W] 25 Power via connector/terminal 5V DC Physical characteristics Design On the wall, Desktop, Rackmount Fans No Chassis design Metal Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 5 up to 40 Width [mm] 325 Height [mm] 44 Depth [mm] 160 General Switchning capacity [Gbps] 84 Packet forwarding rate [Mpps] 62
